---
title: "GTPCNZ"
subtitle: "Interactive reporting for the primary care funding architecture model"
---

GTPCNZ is a public-facing reporting layer for the primary care funding architecture model. It translates the model scaffold into a readable website, reproducible Quarto report, and local Streamlit dashboard.

## Start Here

- [Read the funding architecture report](reports/primary_care_architecture.qmd)
- [Run the Streamlit dashboard](docs/REPORTS-AND-DASHBOARD.md)
- [Deploy the Streamlit dashboard](docs/STREAMLIT-DEPLOYMENT.md)
- [Review the repository guide](README.md)

## Current Status

This is a source-informed, parameterised policy model scaffold. It is not a real-data calibrated forecasting model and should not be used to claim precise fiscal savings, hospital-demand reductions, or workforce effects.

## Local Commands

Render the website:

```bash
quarto render
```

Run the dashboard:

```bash
streamlit run models/primarycare_model/app.py
```
